text:
Million Ants was a superhero and a member of The Vindicators who appeared in "Vindicators 3: The Return of Worldender".

Before becoming Million Ants, he had some sort of tragic background, as in the first challenge, all of the traits are interchangeable and don't matter who they're given to, with one being 'Tragic Backstory'. At some point he and Supernova had an affair. In the Vindicators 2, its shown that Supernova hid the paternity from Alan and it seems Million Ants, himself. As he shows no reaction to her pregnancy announcement, this hints that Supernova probably for a time called the affair off. Upon seeing Alan and Supernova, apparently happy to have a child together. It drives him to attempt to a dating profile, hinting he was lonely.

As for the child, Supernova miscarried it on Dorian 5, which caused the destruction of the entire planet. After Rick's trap killed Doom-Nomitron, Supernova jumped at the chance for their team to take credit. She also used it to cover the deaths of their teammates and the destruction of Dorian 5. Save for Alan Rails, the entire team had no problem with the idea.

Million Ants has also teamed up with Rick and Morty before, but this is unseen. When Worldender comes back, he and the rest of the Vindicators go to fight it. Due to Rick's preemptive defeat of Worldender during a drunken rampage, he and the rest of the Vindicators get stuck in a Rick-created parody of the movie Saw. Eventually, during the challenge where they have to score 5 3-pointers in basketball in 5 minutes, he and Alan Rails get into a fight, which ended with Million Ants killing Alan Rails. At the end of all the challenges, Supernova finally snaps, and ends up murdering Million Ants by ending the life of the queen ant inside him which shocks Rick himself.

According to Rick Sanchez's game, he has a tragic origin, but so do the rest of the Vindicators.

Million Ants is shown to be a rather heroic, level-headed and honorable member of the Vindicators. His personality seems to be at most harmless. He was one of the few Vindicators who wasn't shown to be particularly upset at Rick for putting them in his personal Saw games.

Million Ants was having an affair with Supernova. He is very protective of Supernova, standing up to Alan Rails, however given the revelations of the spinoff series it could show more blind loyalty. He eventually murdered Alan when Supernova attempted to separate them, even though Alan couldn't really fight back.

When Supernova and Crocubot fixed the press release to take credit on fighting Doom-Nomitron and blame him on the deaths of their teammates and Dorian 5 (even though it was Supernova). Like the rest, save Alan, Million Ants doesn't fight the idea. He is indifferent and just tells Alan to smile for the show. That either hints loyalty to Supernova or his inability to understand the broader picture.

Though he murdered Alan, he still has some beliefs. When Supernova was ready to kill Rick and Morty, he stops her. He states that it was her beliefs and pursuit of justice that taught him to be a man, not just a sentient pile of ants. Supernova stated that he was "always the romantic".
